name: Community Food Bank
description: Free groceries and hot meals, no appointment needed.
eligibility: Open to all; bring ID if available.

name: Hope Shelter
description: Emergency overnight shelter and case management.
eligibility: Adults 18+; families referred to partner site.

name: Wellness Counseling Center
description: Sliding-scale counseling and same-day crisis support.
eligibility: Sliding scale based on income; no insurance required.

name: Neighborhood Free Clinic
description: Free primary care and prescription assistance.
